name: i-80 Gold Corp.
description: i-80 Gold Corp. is a well-financed, Nevada-focused mining company with a goal of achieving mid-tier gold producer status. The company is primary focused on the development of its portfolio of high-grade gold and silver deposits, including the Granite Creek, McCoy-Cove, Ruby Hill, and Lone Tree projects, all located in Nevada, USA. With a strong commitment to growth, i-80 Gold is actively exploring and developing these key assets to establish a self-sustaining, multi-asset production profile.
